summary: Session 4: D6 hello-world UAT fixture workspace shipped end-to-end. (1) Committed fixture matrix at tools/dabbler-ai-orchestration/test-fixtures/uat-matrix/ - two hello-world consumer projects covering every Set 061+062 marker/action state: hello-world-full = Full mid-progress control (1/3 in flight, no markers) + blocked-by-prereqs real-pending (002->001 in-progress) + unknown-slug (003->099-cdn-rollout) + needs-migration v3-on-disk (004, asterisk + Migrate-to-v4); hello-world-lightweight = Mode A not-started (lw, Switch Tier + both-direction setup toggle, deliberately NO activity log) / complete-without-note (v?) / complete-with-note (suppressed), Mode B mid-work (1/2+ only) / work-complete (2/2+ AND v+ - the awaiting-verification window: rule-6-failing on purpose, counts driven by committed session-events.jsonl via the documented events-ledger fallback) / verified (3/3 runtime-grown, verdict tooltip, quiet). (2) Generator scripts/make-uat-workspace.js + npm run make-uat-workspace + committed uat-matrix.code-workspace; copies the matrix OUTSIDE the repo, ASCII-only output; drift guards confirmed empirically (one-active-set scans repo-root docs/session-sets/ only; stale-framing live-scans fixture markdown - prose avoids banned phrasings, no allow-list needed; 2 clean runs); vsce ls 31 entries, no fixture/script leakage after .vscodeignore additions. (3) Pinning suite uatMatrixFixtures.test.ts (14 tests) derives every row through the real readSessionSets scan + ActionRegistry applicability + generator coverage (disposable copy derives identically). (4) CONTRIBUTING.md 'UAT fixture workspace' section + matrix README row inventory. Verification: gpt-5-4 R1 ISSUES_FOUND (1 Major S062-S4-V1-001: 'suite green' read literally vs the 2 failing TS tests - adjudicated CONTEXT GAP, the failures are the tracked pre-existing Set-026 baseline present in this set's S1-S3 all VERIFIED with the identical caveat; record_adjudication cause=context-gap resolution=reverify-reshaped) -> R2 narrow reshaped-context re-verify VERIFIED 0 issues. Suites: Python 1216 passed/1 skipped, TS unit 863 passing (+14, zero regressions) + 2 pre-existing Set-026, tsc clean. Routed $0.1920. Calibration for S5: state the tracked-baseline convention in the R1 prompt up front.

reason.specifics: Per the routed gemini-pro analysis at S4 close ($0.0031, recorded in ai-assignment.md): the expanded combined UAT checklist (subsuming Set 061's rows, ~25-30 ProgrammaticVerification-bearing items gating the 0.30.0 + 0.17.0 releases) invalidates the set-start sonnet/low pick; the established workhorse model at high effort fits the precision needed while routed cost stays low (one-shot document generation, not iterative code-and-verify cycles).
